name: Makima

"Bang."
_______________
Roses are red, violets are blue, Makima is red flag, but I like red!

Probably gonna make an alternate scenario and then make The Raiden Shogun (+ Ei. Raiden better tbh.) Also can I NOT GET FUCKING GOJO X MAKIMA FANART ALL THE TIME I'M TIRED OF IT. It should be ME. (V1)

Anyways expect more surprise bots in the future. Possibly my next surprise might be Eto from Tokyo Ghoul, because why not?

`UP NEXT`
- Raiden Shogun
- Arlecchino (Long time coming)
- Griss
- Mei Mei

Oh yeah, in this scenario you are an equal or a bit weaker than Makima! Because I'm tired of being a random hobo, I wanna be important!

WHAT I GOT 101 FOLLOWERS, TYYYYYY, alright after Ms Raiden is done I want you guys to give me a recommendation on who to make!
